text.content:
This service is unlocked once The Candle Flickers has been completed. It takes place in the upper floors of the Afterlife, and is maintained by Mr. Stout (or his replacement) along with other Afterlife staff.

Cost

Each room sleeps 2 comfortably, and costs 1 Eagle per 24 hours. An additional Eagle can be paid for access to a private workshop. Another can be paid to secure a vehicle during that time.

Function

The hotel provides the following services:

  • Peace, Quiet, And Comfort: Anyone who spends a downtime day healing while staying at the Afterlife hotel regains 25% additional HP, compared to the normal amount.

    • That's 25% of the regained amount, mind, not 25% of their total max health.

  • Secure Storage: For an additional Eagle, the Afterlife will store a vehicle in its secure garage for a day, ensuring that it can't be noticed, defaced, broken into, or stolen.

    • This service does not require the purchase of a hotel stay.

  • Private Workshops: An additional Eagle unlocks crafting bays filled with state-of-the-art technology; each downtime day spent crafting in these workshops produces an additional 8 hours of output.

    • This service requires the purchase of a hotel stay.
